<div data-cms-block="marketplace-core/header-buttons" data-attrs=""></div>
<div data-cms-block="marketplace-core/gallery" data-attrs="eyJpbWFnZXMiOlt7InVybCI6IjA5LXNpdGVtYXBzLmpwZyIsImFsdCI6IkZsZXh3ZWcgU2l0ZW1hcHMifV19"></div>

## Description

A full XML sitemap pipeline that respects static hosting. On every publish, Sitemaps incrementally regenerates only the year-sitemap that contains the touched post (plus the index, plus News if enabled). Years that empty out get their sitemap deleted automatically.

Includes a localised XSL stylesheet so a browser opening any sitemap URL sees a readable HTML table instead of raw XML. The optional News sitemap respects a configurable window (default 2 days) and the robots.txt is editable from the settings page.
